[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person stands smiling in an indoor billiards hall next to a pool table.

Main Subject:
A person with dark, medium-length hair stands facing the camera beside a black pool table. They wear a dark blue short-sleeve T-shirt, dark pants, a necklace with a chain, and a wristwatch, holding a relaxed posture with arms down and a slight smile.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors in a billiards or game room with multiple pool tables. Overhead lighting fixtures are visible, and long LED strip lights run along the ceiling and around structural columns. In the background, more tables and a few other people are partially visible near tables, with a lit, organized layout.

Visual Details:
The pool table in the foreground has a black frame and the word “ORILEY’S” visible on its side panel. The playing surface shows colorful balls arranged on the felt. The camera angle is slightly low and front-facing, with the person positioned near the near edge of the table. The lighting is bright and even, casting clear highlights on metal surfaces and columns.

Visible Text:
ORILEY’S

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person standing next to a pool table in a brightly lit indoor billiards room. Other pool tables and ceiling/LED lighting are visible in the background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No readable text is clearly visible in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- [No extractable text found]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to be a photo of a pool/billiards area and does not contain legible UI text, captions, or document text.
- There is partial branding on the tables (e.g., “ORELY’S” or similar), but it is not clear enough to extract reliably.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with dark, styled hair stands confidently in the center of a modern billiard hall. He is wearing a dark grey t-shirt, dark ripped jeans, and a silver chain with a pendant. He is holding a pool cue in his right hand. The hall is dimly lit, with dramatic vertical LED lighting accentuating the grey pillars and walls. Overhead, large, rectangular light fixtures with purple and white elements illuminate the space. Several pool tables with green felt are visible, some with colorful balls racked up. The tables have the brand "ORILEY'S" printed on their sides. In the background, there are tables and chairs for patrons, and other people can be seen in the distance. The overall mood is cool and contemporary, with a focus on the interplay of light and shadow. The color palette is dominated by greys, blacks, and the vibrant accent colors of the lighting and pool balls.
